title: Nested case results in message: "Predicate CASE 42: time to implement some more"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c INTEGER, d VARCHAR(10), e BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t VALUES (1, 'test', TRUE), (2, 'example', FALSE);
CREATE TABLE u (f INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, g FLOAT);
SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t WHERE d = 'test') > 0 THEN CASE c WHEN 1 THEN 10 ELSE 20 END ELSE 30 END FROM t;
key_bug_features: Nested CASE statement with invalid condition evaluation
